name: tv.tootie/synapse2
title: Synapse2
description: Local Docker, Compose, host, SSH, log, ZFS, and file operations for MCP agents.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for /mcp authentication when running mounted HTTP in bearer mode.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_HOSTS_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional inline JSON host topology. If unset, Synapse2 discovers SSH hosts from ~/.ssh/config and appends the built-in local host.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a JSON host topology file with a top-level hosts array.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode for mounted HTTP: bearer or oauth.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public HTTPS base URL required when OAuth mode is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID, required only when OAuth mode is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client secret, required only when OAuth mode is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_MCP_AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Initial admin Google account email, required only when OAuth mode is enabled.
